explanation:
The **environment** is a key issue of the 21st century. Measuring your impact (CO₂, water, waste) and reducing it through concrete actions is both an individual and collective responsibility.

## How It's Calculated

This calculator applies the formula with the values you enter, checking typical ranges and alerting you to unreasonable values.

## Final Notes

This calculation is a reference estimate only. For critical decisions (financial, medical, legal), consult with a specialized professional. Values are current to 2026 and reviewed regularly.

faq.q: How much CO₂ does sending an email produce?
faq.a: A text-only email produces about 4g CO₂, while one with a large attachment produces around 50g CO₂. This depends on server energy, network transmission, and device power consumption.

faq.q: Why do emails have a carbon footprint?
faq.a: Emails require energy from data center servers, network infrastructure, and your device. Larger files (with attachments) require more energy to transmit and store.

faq.q: How much does a large attachment increase email emissions?
faq.a: A large attachment can increase emissions by up to 12x compared to a text-only email. Compression and shared links (like Drive or Dropbox) significantly reduce the impact.

faq.q: How can I reduce email carbon emissions?
faq.a: Use shared links instead of attachments, compress files, remove image signatures, unsubscribe from newsletters you don't read, and clean up old emails regularly.

faq.q: Does deleting old emails reduce my carbon footprint?
faq.a: Yes. Each GB stored produces about 0.01 kg CO₂/year. Cleaning up 100 GB saves roughly 1 kg CO₂ annually.

faq.q: What's the environmental impact of Teams or Slack vs. email?
faq.a: Messaging apps can be similar or lower in emissions than email. Discord is more efficient due to reduced redundancy compared to traditional email systems.
The results are estimates. We use internationally validated formulas. For critical cases, consult a sustainability professional.
Yes, all our calculators are completely free and require no account or registration.
